title: doronicum carpaticum
intro: Doronicum carpaticum, also known as Carpathian leopard's bane or mountain leopard's bane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, due to its active compounds like sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. In herbal preparations, Doronicum carpaticum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
